title: Treatment for Mild Symptoms
content: Mild symptoms include headache, toothache, fever, flu, or cold. These commonly occur during seasonal changes and can mostly be treated at home. It is recommended to stay home, drink enough water, take Vitamin C, and get adequate sleep. If these mild symptoms do not improve after 3 days, it is recommended to connect with an XCare online doctor.

title: Treatment for Critical Symptoms
content: Critical symptoms are urgent cases and include being unconscious, getting into an accident, having a broken arm or leg, severe stomachache, or suffering a heart attack. These usually lead to internal damages. It is recommended to connect with an XCare online doctor immediately, and then you must go to a nearby medical center for a quick checkup.
